summary: Remove two stale pre-merge and pre-qualification claims from the live public README.

decisions.decision: Treat current-state sentences embedded in historical milestone tables as public release claims and update them when the release lands.
decisions.rationale: The live visitor audit showed that the README simultaneously called the beta public and said its branch and installer gates were still pending. Historical context does not justify a present-tense contradiction on the public front door.

testEvidence.criterion: The live README must not retain current-state pre-merge or pre-qualification claims after publication.
testEvidence.test: Search the release-facing documents and inspect the rendered GitHub repository page after deployment.

red.command: Live GitHub repository visitor audit after publishing v0.1.0-beta.1
red.outcome: RED: rendered README said the milestone branch still awaited landing and the current Windows candidate still required exact-head installer gates.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/scripts/security-policy.test.ts tests/scripts/m2-boundary-docs.test.ts && pnpm.cmd check:provenance
green.outcome: GREEN: focused release-document tests and provenance validation passed; the stale strings are absent.

questions: No owner decision is required; this is a public-surface honesty correction.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
